problem: Cardiac patients require continuous monitoring across care settings, but fragmented monitoring solutions create gaps between home and hospital care. Clinicians struggle to manage patient populations proactively and deliver care in the right setting at the right time.
solution: Philips BioTelemetry (formerly CardioNet) provides comprehensive ambulatory cardiac monitoring solutions including Mobile Cardiac Telemetry (MCOT), Extended Holter monitoring (ePatch), and EMR integration. The platform connects home to hospital and hospital to home, enabling care teams to diagnose and manage cardiac patients proactively. Combined with Philips in-hospital diagnostic cardiology solutions, it creates a complete cardiac care ecosystem.
